name: TestJoinFrPOCState
title: TestJoinFrPOCState
description: Completes the current set of "joined events" with the transmitted event.
Consider to set always the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment before the function is called.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: aPOCState
parameters.description: The POC state the function will wait for (see selector 'FR_POCState' in event procedure on FrPOCState).
